arts.ttl: Arsenal make David Raya decision after goalkeeper accused of faking Man City injury
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has reportedly decided to turn to teenager Jack Porter in between the sticks for Arsenal against Bolton in the Carabao Cup with David Raya injured and Neto cup-tied - giving the youngster a huge opportunity

arts.ttl: Liverpool target Arsenal star’s brother as Slot seeks his Frenkie de Jong
arts.sum: Liverpool target Arsenal star’s brother as Slot seeks his Frenkie de Jong Liverpool manager Arne Slot is ready to raid former club Feyenoord to sign Quinten Timber .

arts.ttl: Arsenal set to start 16yo goalkeeper in EFL Cup
arts.sum: Arsenal are set to start 16-year-old goalkeeper Jack Porter in Wednesday's Carabao Cup third-round tie against Bolton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: 'Super professional': Fabrizio Romano shares what £100k p/w Arsenal player is doing to improve under Arteta
Arsenal Team News v Bolton Leaked, 16 y/o to Start
arts.sum: Arsenal team news has been leaked early ahead of their clash with Bolton, with five expected starters named.

TeamTalk reports that Arsenal will finally sign a new top-class striker in 2025 and have compiled a four-man shortlist. Arsenal have compiled a four-man striker shortlist for 2025, according to TeamTalk.

arts.ttl: 'Best in the business' - Mikel Arteta has found Arsenal's missing piece to beat Man City - football.london
arts.sum: Raya, who won the Premier League’s Golden Glove last season, has started all six games for Arsenal domestically and in the Champions League this term, conceding just three goals in all competitions. I know Villa are a good team, but you are expecting Arsenal to win these games particularly at home.

arts.ttl: Who is Jack Porter? The 16-year-old set for senior Arsenal debut amid goalkeeper injury crisis
arts.sum: With that in mind, 16-year-old Jack Porter looks set to be in between the sticks for the clash at Emirates Stadium and football.london has taken a look at everything there is to know about the teenager. Mikel Arteta looks set to make a number of changes to his Arsenal starting XI for the Carabao Cup clash against Bolton, with one of those enforced.

arts.ttl: Arsenal staff think they have a really ‘confident’ youngster who could make debut vs Bolton
Paul Scholes concerned Arsenal aren’t clicking as Man Utd legend makes worrying claim
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta's team nearly secured a victory over the reigning champions at the Etihad Stadium on Sunday, despite being reduced to 10 men. However, Manchester United icon Scholes still feels that "it's not quite clicking" for Arsenal and has been unimpressed by the Gunners' attacking prowess in open play.
